{{Quote|If you can't find it in our store, it may find you!|Pets' "N" Pieces promotional advertising|<ref name="HNN">{{HoloNetNewsAd|url=meta/img/ads/600_5.gif|text=Pets' "N" Pieces}}</ref>}}
'''Pets' "N" Pieces''' billed itself as the "[[CoCo Town/Legends|CoCo District's]] premier pet store!" A sampling of the pets it sold included [[Anooba/Legends|anoobas]], [[Narglatch/Legends|narglatch]], [[Veermok/Legends|veermok]], [[Bantha/Legends|bantha]], [[Eopie/Legends|eopies]], [[Womp rat/Legends|womp rats]], [[Nuna/Legends|nuna]], [[Nuna/Legends|dwarf nuna]], [[Dinko (creature)|dinkos]], [[Tooke/Legends|tookes]], and [[Sarlacc/Legends|sarlaccs]]. It specialized in dangerous and rare animals, and was located at 250 [[Pom Plaza]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
